description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in SelectaPix 1.31 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) albumID parameter to (a) view_album.php or (b) index.php, (2) imageID parameter to (c) popup.php, or (3) username and (4) password parameters to (d) admin/member.php.
